subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-11-24
subcodes.first_line: In the time of the Manifestations of God people were hindered mostly in two ways. First the statements of the previous books were not understood.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @physical limitations of the Manifestation of God, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @literal interpretation
